name: Dotenv Vault
description: Dotenv Vault — Encrypted secrets sync service for .env files enabling secure sharing across team members and CI environments.

seo.title: Dotenv Vault — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Dotenv Vault: Dotenv Vault — Encrypted secrets sync service for .env files enabling secure sharing across team members and CI environments.

when_to_use: Encrypted .env file sync across dev team members
CI/CD secret injection without plaintext env vars in repos
Audit log of who accessed which environment secrets
One-command secret pull for onboarding new developers

pros: Encrypts and syncs across devs and CI
Push/pull CLI mirrors Git muscle memory
cons: Free tier is limited on environments
review.verdict: Nice upgrade over sharing .env files in Slack, but stops short of real secrets management.
review.best_for: Small teams syncing Node/Next.js .env files across devs and CI safely.
review.not_for: Orgs needing RBAC, dynamic creds, or audit trails.
